findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The North Carolina state seal image at the top of page 1 is missing in the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the Great Seal of North Carolina at the top center of the letterhead. The HTML rendering does not display this seal image.

findings.description: The DEQ logo at the bottom of page 1 is missing in the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the North Carolina DEQ logo at the bottom of the page near the footer. The HTML rendering does not display this logo.

findings.description: Reading order disruption: header/footer content from the letterhead is repeated between page-equivalent sections in the HTML
findings.evidence: The HTML inserts the full letterhead block (ROY COOPER Governor, ELIZABETH S. BISER Secretary, MICHAEL ABRACZINSKAS Director, NORTH CAROLINA Environmental Quality, date, recipient address, subject line) between what corresponds to page 1 and page 2 content in the PDF, creating a repeated block that disrupts reading flow.

findings.description: In the PDF page 1, the CFR reference reads '40 CFR 51.308(±)' (likely an OCR artifact for '(f)'). The HTML corrects this to '40 CFR 51.308(f)'. This is an acceptable OCR correction, not a finding.
findings.evidence: PDF: '40 CFR 51.308(±)'; HTML: '40 CFR 51.308(f)' - this is an improvement.
